final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic poster illustrating step-by-step instructions for deploying Hermes inside a Docker container and integrating it with GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: clean flat vector infographic, technical documentation style, structured layout with numbered steps
Composition: vertical single-column layout, top-to-bottom flow with connecting arrows between steps, each step in its own clearly bordered card
Subject: four numbered steps (1→2→3→4) showing: 1) pulling/building the Docker image for Hermes, 2) running the Docker container with configuration flags, 3) connecting Hermes service to GLMCodingPlan endpoint, 4) verifying the integration is live; each step card contains a small icon, a bold step number, a short command or diagram snippet
Scene/backdrop: plain light gray or white background, no decorative environment
Lighting/mood: flat, no shadows, neutral and technical
Color palette: deep navy blue for step headers and numbering, teal/cyan accent for arrows and connectors, white card backgrounds, monospace code snippets in a dark code-block style
Text (verbatim): "1" "2" "3" "4" "Docker" "Hermes" "GLMCodingPlan"
Constraints: step numbers 1 2 3 4 must be visually prominent and unambiguous; arrows must clearly indicate sequential flow downward; code snippets must be legible at poster size; layout must be scannable at a glance
Avoid: photorealistic textures, gradients, decorative illustrations unrelated to the technical flow, cluttered backgrounds, overlapping text
